title: Time prepositions: depuis, pendant, pour
subtitle: Say how long and what duration.
duolingoBridge: A2 conversations often ask how long something has happened.
overview: Knowledge point 1: depuis connects past to now.
Knowledge point 2: pendant gives duration; pour often points to planned duration.

sections.title: Duration map
rows: for two years / since two years ago

items.fr: J’apprends le français depuis deux mois.
items.en: I have been learning French for two months.
items.es: Aprendo francés desde hace dos meses.

items.fr: Je reste ici pour une semaine.
items.en: I am staying here for one week.
items.es: Me quedo aquí por una semana.

items.en: He has worked here since Monday.

items.fr: Nous sommes ouverts jusqu’à huit heures.
items.en: We are open until eight o’clock.
